title: Hosted Checkout Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for redirect-based checkout flows where the buyer completes payment in a provider-controlled UI via UCP escalation (requires_escalation + continue_url). Platforms SHOULD NOT attempt credential acquisition for this instrument type — no token or card data is exchanged through UCP. Payment handling occurs entirely within the hosted UI.

type.description: Discriminator indicating a hosted checkout instrument. Signals to platforms that no credential acquisition is needed — this instrument type always resolves via requires_escalation + continue_url.

display.description: Display information for rendering this instrument in platform UI (e.g., a branded checkout button).

name.description: Human-readable provider name shown to the buyer (e.g., 'Pay with Razorpay', 'PayPal Checkout').

logo_url.description: HTTPS URL to the provider's logo image for use in branded checkout buttons.

description.description: Short description of payment methods available via the hosted UI (e.g., 'UPI, Cards, Netbanking & more').

credential.description: Reference-only credential populated by the business in the Complete Checkout response. Contains a session identifier and redirect URLs — no sensitive payment data.

available_hosted_checkout_instrument.title: Available Hosted Checkout Instrument
available_hosted_checkout_instrument.description: Declares hosted checkout instrument availability in a payment handler's available_instruments list.
